title: xanthophyllum stipitatum
intro: Xanthophyllum stipitatum is a plant species in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as a shrub or small tree, native to tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum stipitatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal medicine preparations, such as capsules, tablets, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
